name: feature
describe: Run the Feature Flow: research the issue, plan the implementation, build it, review the PR, and fix review findings when needed.

steps.reason: Research the requested feature or refactor and gather the relevant repo context.
Create the implementation plan before changing code.
Implement the planned feature, verify it, and open or update the pull request.
Review the generated pull request before calling the feature flow complete.
Apply review feedback when the review reports concerns or a blocking failure.
